name: Ultraman Orb: The Origin Saga
original_name: ウルトラマンオーブ THE ORIGIN SAGA
overview: The story chronicles upon the past of Gai Kurenai and Jugglus Juggler, the original series' main protagonist and antagonist, who were once heroes fighting on the side of light, facing Dr. Psychi and his army of Bezelbs.

trailers.title: "Ultraman Orb The Origin Saga" Trailer Vol.1 ! Only on Amazon Prime video!
